channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Hindu Group Presents ASI Report Claiming Temple Preceded Mosque at Bhojshala Site
item.description: The Hindu Front for Justice informed the Madhya Pradesh High Court that documents and a scientific survey conducted by the Archaeological Survey of India (ASI) indicate that a temple existed at the Bh...

item.title: Former Vovida Communications employee arrested for stealing N15m worth of IT equipment at airport
item.description: The Airport Police Command at Murtala Muhammed International Airport has arrested one George Ikpe, a 28-year-old former staff of Vovida Communications Limited, an IT solutions company. The suspect was...

item.title: Balancing Urban Development with Historical Preservation
item.description: Cities are living archives of human memory, with historic streets, buildings, and neighbourhoods serving as palimpsests—layers of history visible beneath contemporary urban life. However, rapid urbani...

item.title: Hawaii Faces Renewed Major Flood Threat from Multi-Day Storm Two Weeks After Record Flooding
item.description: A potent multi-day storm is intensifying over Hawaii, bringing heavy rainfall and renewing a significant flood threat across the islands just two weeks after the state experienced its worst flooding i...

item.title: Grace Tame Foundation shuts down due to financial difficulties
item.description: The Grace Tame Foundation, established by the former Australian of the Year and sexual abuse survivor, has announced its closure, citing difficulties with securing long-term funding. The foundation, l...

item.title: Delhi CM and LG Attend GGSIPU Convocation, Thousands of Degrees Conferred
item.description: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta and Lieutenant Governor Taranjit Singh Sandhu attended the 18th convocation of Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU) at its Surajmal Vihar campus. In her ...

item.title: EACC Survey Reveals Justice Sector Faces Highest Bribe Amounts in Kenya
item.description: A new report from the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) and the Kenya National Bureau of Statistics (KNBS) has revealed that magistrates receive the highest average bribe in Kenya, estimate...

item.title: Punjab Health Scheme Funds Heart Surgery For Four-Month-Old Infant
item.description: A four-month-old baby from Punjab, born with a congenital heart defect known as a hole in the heart, has received a new lease of life thanks to financial assistance under the Punjab government's healt...

item.title: Minor short circuit causes brief fire at Mumbai Airport Terminal 1B; operations remain normal
item.description: On Thursday evening, 9 April 2026, a minor fire incident occurred at Terminal 1B of Mumbai’s Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport. According to Ravindra Ambulgekar, the Chief Fire Officer of the ...

item.title: Detailed guide to NITA courses, fees, and application process for 2026 intake in Kenya
item.description: The National Industrial Training Authority (NITA) is a government agency under Kenya’s Ministry of Labour that oversees vocational and industry-based training across the country. It was established un...

item.title: Discovery of a New African Magic Mushroom Species Explains Evolution of Psilocybe cubensis
item.description: Researchers don identify one new species of magic mushroom wey dem call Psilocybe ochraceocentrata for South Africa and Zimbabwe. Dis discovery fit help answer long-standing question about where the f...

item.title: TBL Praises Government's Ongoing Efforts to Combat Illicit Alcohol in Tanzania
item.description: Tanzania Breweries Limited (TBL) has lauded the government’s measures against illicit alcohol trade, highlighting its severe threat to public health and the economy. The company pointed out that the o...

item.title: Cast of The Testaments Discusses Adapting Atwood’s Novel and Its Modern Relevance
item.description: The Hulu series 'The Testaments,' adapted from Margaret Atwood’s 2019 novel and a follow-up to 'The Handmaid’s Tale,' recently wrapped filming in Ontario and is now streaming on Disney+. Scottish actr...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens announce date for playoff ticket sales
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens have officially confirmed that tickets for their upcoming playoff games will soon be available for purchase. The announcement, reported by CTV News Montreal and written by Danie...

item.title: Federal Judge Temporarily Halts Termination of Ethiopia’s Temporary Protected Status
item.description: A federal judge in Massachusetts has temporarily blocked the Trump administration's attempt to end Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for Ethiopian nationals. The ruling came after a lawsuit challenged ...

item.title: Randwick hosts star-studded Group 1 racing day with Autumn Glow and Tempted in spotlight
item.description: The weekend’s racing action at Randwick is shaping up as one of the highlights of the autumn season, with stars like Autumn Glow and Tempted set to dominate a packed program of Group 1 contests. The m...

item.title: Manitoba Government Weighs Renewed Gas Tax Relief Amid Rising Fuel Costs
item.description: Manitoba Premier Wab Kinew is considering a new round of gas tax relief as fuel prices continue to climb across the province. The previous gas tax holiday introduced by his government had temporarily ...

item.title: British Airways Shifts Focus: Cuts Middle East Flights, Boosts Routes to India and Africa
item.description: British Airways is significantly altering its flight network, responding to ongoing geopolitical tensions and seeking to capitalise on reduced capacity amongst competitors like Emirates, Etihad, and Q...

item.title: Cardinal Tagle and Bishop Maralit named to key Vatican communications posts
item.description: Pope Leo XIV has appointed Filipino Church leaders Cardinal Luis Antonio Tagle and Bishop Marcelino Maralit to serve in the Vatican’s Dicastery for Communication, further strengthening Filipino presen...

item.title: Animated Series 'Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord' Debuts With Perfect Rotten Tomatoes Score
item.description: The new animated Star Wars series 'Star Wars: Maul – Shadow Lord' has launched to near‑universal acclaim on Rotten Tomatoes, opening with a 100 percent critics score from over a dozen reviews. Set in ...
